revision.comment: 1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Category:All_articles_lacking_in-text_citations]]
ce, add random, topic filter
1 revision imported
Copying from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia2]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia2]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] to [[Category:Articles tagged as templates and modules]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Articles tagged as templates and modules]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] to [[Category:new pages]][[Category:new pages]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:qq]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:qqq]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:List of Shikinaisha]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "qq" to "11"
Removing from [[Category:New]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Removing from [[Category:New]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (83 members)
Bot: tidy & size tag (84 members)
Bot: tidy & size tag (98 members)
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with 98 members
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵↵}}↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
1 revision imported
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q8235693)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{polluted category}}
{{hidden category}}
{{cleanup category}}
{{backlog|100}}
{{tl|No footnotes}}
{{tl|More footnotes}}
{{CatAutoTOC}}
{{align|center|{{resbox|'''{{large|{{Random page in category}}}}'''}}}}
{{Filter category by topic}}
{{wikidata link|Q8235693}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:All articles lacking in-text citations]]
[[en:Category:All articles lacking in-text citations]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:sn_crud|TESTAll articles lacking in-text citations]]
[[Category:Articles lacking in-text citations| ]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] (crud category cleanup) [[git:Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/22556809750|manual triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=All_articles_lacking_in-text_citations here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=All_articles_lacking_in-text_citations for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
<!--templates-->
{{polluted category}}
{{hidden category}}
{{cleanup category}}
{{backlog|100}}
{{tl|No footnotes}}
{{tl|More footnotes}}
{{CatAutoTOC}}
{{align|center|{{resbox|'''{{large|{{Random page in category}}}}'''}}}}
{{Filter category by topic}}
{{wikidata link|Q8235693}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:All articles lacking in-text citations]]
[[en:Category:All articles lacking in-text citations]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:sn_crud|TESTAll articles lacking in-text citations]]
[[Category:Articles lacking in-text citations| ]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 2 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template (has duplicate-language pairs) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25263326738|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=All_articles_lacking_in-text_citations for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->

{{polluted category}}
{{hidden category}}
{{cleanup category}}
{{backlog|100}}
{{tl|No footnotes}}
{{tl|More footnotes}}
{{CatAutoTOC}}
{{align|center|{{resbox|'''{{large|{{Random page in category}}}}'''}}}}
{{Filter category by topic}}
{{wikidata link|Q8235693|en|All articles lacking in-text citations|en|Category:All articles lacking in-text citations}}

[[Category:sn_crud|TESTAll articles lacking in-text citations]]
[[Category:Articles lacking in-text citations| ]]
